modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty signing up and configuring Duo Multi-Factor Authentication

full_description_text:  
User is attempting to sign up for Duo Multi-Factor Authentication.  
User is also trying to configure Duo for their account.  
The process is unclear, and user needs guidance on both signing up and configuration steps.  
User is seeking detailed instructions to complete the setup successfully.
